TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Genzyumin_na_heci, title = Genzyumin_na_heci, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Genzyumin_na_heci} }

S.FORM: Genzyumin na heci kbhun ku s'uli ga sazing hi nanak Genzyumin hiya. kyala smka s'uli Genzyumin ga, niya maki alang, kruma smka s'uli Genzyumin ga, rema wayan maki sku heci. pt'wagan heci ga hminas sku alang, ba balay hmuluy inlungan mrkyas tayan. mbaziy sali heci laha lga, mtyaw, msu'un sku utux b'ni ru mgla'i kya. nanu yasa, pyux Genzyumin mgla'i lla'i tikuy ru mrkyas sku heci misu ryax soni.

Genzyumin na heci kbhun ku s'uli ga sazing hi nanak Genzyumin hiya. kyala smka s'uli Genzyumin ga, niya maki alang, kruma smka s'uli Genzyumin ga, rema wayan maki sku heci. pt'wagan heci ga hminas sku alang, ba balay hmuluy inlungan mrkyas tayan. mbaziy sali heci laha lga, mtyaw, msu'un sku utux b'ni ru mgla'i kya. nanu yasa, pyux Genzyumin mgla'i lla'i tikuy ru mrkyas sku heci misu ryax soni.
S.PHON: ɣenzjumin na ħeʦ~ʨi kβħun ku s~ɕʔuli ɣa s~ɕaziŋ ħi nanak ɣenzjumin ħija. kjala s~ɕmka s~ɕʔuli ɣenzjumin ɣa, nija maki alaŋ, kruma s~ɕmka s~ɕʔuli ɣenzjumin ɣa, rema wajan maki s~ɕku ħeʦ~ʨi. ptʔwaɣan ħeʦ~ʨi ɣa ħminas~ɕ s~ɕku alaŋ, βa βalaj ħmuluj inluŋan mrkjas~ɕ tajan. mβazij s~ɕali ħeʦ~ʨi laħa lɣa, mtjaw, ms~ɕuʔun s~ɕku utux βʔni ru mɣlaʔi kja. nanu jas~ɕa, pjux ɣenzjumin mɣlaʔi llaʔi tikuj ru mrkjas~ɕ s~ɕku ħeʦ~ʨi mis~ɕu rjax s~ɕoni.
